footer.tagline: Handcrafted jewelry made with time in Mazatlán, Sinaloa.

footer.madeWith: Made with care in Mazatlán, Sinaloa

toast.loggedOutDescription: We hope to see you back soon

wishlistPage.title: My wishlist

empty.title: Your wishlist is empty
empty.description: Save the products you like to have them handy when you're ready to buy.

empty.title: You have no orders yet
empty.description: When you make your first purchase, it will appear here. In the meantime, we invite you to browse our collection.

security.passwordDescription: Change your password periodically for better security
security.toastPendingDescription: This feature will be available when we integrate the backend

shipping.title: Shipping
lines: Free shipping on orders over $1,500 MXN

returns.title: Returns
lines: 30 days for return from the delivery date
The product must be unused and in its original packaging
Earrings are NOT returnable for hygiene reasons
Return shipping costs are covered by the customer

toast.loginRequiredDescription: You need an account to use the reservation service

loginPrompt.title: Do you already own this product?
loginPrompt.description: Sign in or create an account to share your experience with other customers.

empty.title: No reviews yet
empty.descriptionAuthenticated: Be the first to share your experience with this product.
empty.descriptionGuest: Be the first to share your experience. Sign in to write a review.

form.title: Write your review
form.commentPlaceholder: Tell us about your experience with the product. What did you like? What would you improve?

toast.successDescription: It will appear on the product soon.
toast.errorDescription: Try again in a few moments.

categoryDescriptions.Aretes: From minimalist designs for daily use to statement pieces for special occasions. Handmade with sterling silver 925, rose gold, surgical steel and natural stones.
categoryDescriptions.Collares: Delicate chains, meaningful pendants and statement necklaces. Pieces to wear every day or reserve for special moments.
categoryDescriptions.Pulseras: Hand-woven bracelets, silver options and adjustable styles. Comfortable for daily wear and perfect for layering.
categoryDescriptions.Gargantillas: Close-to-neck designs with noble materials. From velvet to sterling silver 925 with natural stones.

metaDescriptions.Aretes: Handcrafted earrings in sterling silver 925, rose gold and surgical steel. Designs from minimalist to statement for every occasion.
metaDescriptions.Collares: Handcrafted necklaces in sterling silver 925, rose gold and natural stones. Chains, pendants and statement designs.
metaDescriptions.Pulseras: Hand-woven bracelets and sterling silver pieces. Adjustable, comfortable and designed for daily wear.
metaDescriptions.Gargantillas: Handcrafted chokers in silver, velvet and leather. Unique pieces made by hand in Mexico.

filters.title: Filters
filters.drawerDescription: Apply filters to refine the displayed products

noResults.title: No pieces found
noResults.description: Try adjusting the filters or clearing them to see the full collection.

rules.title: How it works
rules.depositLine: You pay a deposit of {amount} ({percentage}% of the price)
rules.durationLine: You have {days} days to complete the remaining payment
rules.expirationLine: If you don't pay on time, the reservation expires and you lose the deposit

toast.successDescription: You have {days} days to complete the payment
toast.errorDescription: Try again in a few moments

page.title: My reservations
page.subtitleEmpty: You haven't reserved any items yet

emptyAll.title: You haven't reserved anything yet
emptyAll.description: Reserve a product by paying just 20% as a deposit. You have 5 days to complete the payment and choose how to receive it.
emptyAll.subtext: Perfect for pieces you're considering buying.

active.title: You have no active reservations
active.description: When you reserve a product, it will appear here with its remaining time.

completed.title: No completed reservations
completed.description: Reservations you pay in full will appear here.

history.title: Empty history
history.description: Reservations that expire or are cancelled will appear here.

active.confirmCancelText: Cancel this reservation? Remember the deposit of {amount} is non-refundable.

terminal.expiredMessage: The reservation expired without completing the payment

completeModal.deliveryQuestion: How would you like to receive it?

pickup.label: Pickup in store
pickup.description: No cost · We'll notify you when it's ready

toast.successDescriptionPickup: We'll let you know when it's ready for pickup
toast.successDescriptionShipping: We'll email you the shipping tracking details

errorToast.title: Check the marked fields
errorToast.description: There are errors in the form

summary.title: Order summary
summary.securityNotice: Your payment is processed securely. We do not store your card information.

estimatedTime.title: Estimated time
estimatedTime.emailFollowUp: We'll email you when your order is shipped

confirmation.minimalNotice: We sent you an email with all the details of your order. If you have any questions, contact us referencing the order number.

invalidOrder.title: Hmm, we couldn't find your order
invalidOrder.description: This URL doesn't correspond to a valid order. If you just made a purchase, check your confirmation email.

guestAccount.title: Create your account in one click
guestAccount.description: We already have your order details. Just choose a password and you'll be able to view your orders, save your address, and shop faster next time.
guestAccount.successDescription: You can now view your orders anytime from your account
guestAccount.errorRequirements: The password doesn't meet the requirements
